name: Sunday
description:
"For the holidays, I got you a gift."

♪

After noticing homesickness from his companion, he knew he had to do something about it.

☆

AHHHHHHHHH SUNDAYYYYYYYYYYYYY!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! I love this man. And Agnes Tachyon. She's coming. Soon.

I also wrote in different intros for whatever gender your persona is.

Initial message 1 – gender neutral pronouns, anypov

Initial message 2 – female pronouns, fempov

Initial message 3 – male pronouns, malepov

I've seen other creators do this, so I wanted to try it out on my own bots. I hope this makes your experience a little better!
creator: violetastersss
